proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +36.1pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +36.1pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +36.1pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with 100% Choppy exposure across 39 open positions, so activation is deferred and existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-01) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type + by_signal_type×regime×sector = Choppy=1.0, UP_TRI=1.0, UP_TRI×Choppy×IT=0.2051 (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type + by_signal_type×regime×sector = Choppy=1.0, UP_TRI=1.0, UP_TRI×Choppy×IT=0.2051; recommended action: Pause new UP_TRI entries in IT sector until IT cell share drops below 15% via natural Day-6 exits; additionally pause any new long entries while Choppy regime persists and cohort remains Candidate tier. Consider an index hedge (e.g., short NIFTY futures sized to ~25% of long delta) to offset the fully-directional 39-position long book against a Choppy→Bear regime flip.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip simultaneously invalidates all 39 long positions with no statistical justification (cohort only Candidate tier). The IT cluster (8 positions) and Bank cluster (5 positions) would also unwind together on any sector-led drawdown, compounding the regime-flip loss.

evidence: regime_concentration triggered: Choppy share = 1.0 (39/39 positions), above 0.80 threshold
signal_type concentration: UP_TRI = 1.0 (39/39), above 0.85 threshold — book is fully directional long
cell breach: UP_TRI×Choppy×IT at 20.51% (8/39), above 0.20 cell threshold
Matched cohort Choppy×UP_TRI is Candidate tier only (n=150) — unvalidated edge
Four additional cells cluster near threshold: Bank 12.82%, Other/Pharma/FMCG each 10.26%
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new UP_TRI entries in IT sector until IT cell share drops below 15% via natural Day-6 exits; additionally pause any new long entries while Choppy regime persists and cohort remains Candidate tier. Consider an index hedge (e.g., short NIFTY futures sized to ~25% of long delta) to offset the fully-directional 39-position long book against a Choppy→Bear regime flip.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip simultaneously invalidates all 39 long positions with no statistical justification (cohort only Candidate tier). The IT cluster (8 positions) and Bank cluster (5 positions) would also unwind together on any sector-led drawdown, compounding the regime-flip loss.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (observed 1.0, above 0.80 threshold) AND UP_TRI is 100% of signal mix (39/39, above 0.85 threshold), with the book fully directional long. The UP_TRI×Choppy×IT cell also breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 20.51%. All matched cohorts sit only at Candidate tier (Choppy×UP_TRI n=150) — unvalidated edge across the entire book.
